studyName: The Preterm Infant Microbiome: Biological, Behavioral and Health Outcomes at 2 and 4 Years of Age

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample IDs, body site, analyte type, histological type, tumor status, complications, medications, pregnancy problems, Apgar scores, sickness scores, retinopathy, bronchopulmonary dysplasia, sepsis, necrotizing enterocolitis, intraventricular hemorrhage, other illness, transfusion, days needing oxygen, feeding intolerance, epidermal growth factors, IL-10, IL-4, IL-6, IL-8, IP-10, MCP, IP-1 alpha, TNF alpha, fecal calprotecin, secretory IgA, mother's own milk, mother's own milk + human milk fortifier (HMF), formula, donor milk, donor milk with HMF, total volume of mother milk +milk with HMF, total volume of all milk, and ratio of mother's own milk to all milk.

variables.name: APGAR1MIN
variables.description: Apgar score of testing newborn's breathing effort, heart rate, muscle tone, reflexes, and skin color after one minute

variables.name: APGAR5MIN
variables.description: Apgar score of testing newborn's breathing effort, heart rate, muscle tone, reflexes, and skin color after five minutes

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject IDs, days after birth, mother's basic information (n=7 variables; age, height, ethnicity, education level, marital status, employment status, and working hours per week), ethnicity of father,  household income, number of individuals living in the house, and pregnancy history and infant status.

variables.name: CIGPREG
variables.description: Number of cigarettes smoked while pregnant

variables.name: CIGSMOK
variables.description: Number of cigarettes smoked per day

variables.name: DECEASED
variables.description: Infant died prior to release from the hospital

variables.name: DISCHARGEWEIGHT
variables.description: Infant weight at discharge from hospital

variables.name: DRUGPREG
variables.description: Mother ever taken prescription medication while pregnant

variables.name: HRSWK
variables.description: Total number of hours worked per week

variables.name: NUMHOUSE
variables.description: Number of individuals living in the house

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID of study participant

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample source and sample use.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID of study participant
